messages.text: can u give me the document refulation of gdpr

[CONCEPT SUMMARY]: The GDPR is Regulation (EU) 2016/679, enacted on April 27, 2016, and it governs the protection of personal data for individuals within the EU, facilitating the free movement of this data.

[LEGAL CITATION]: Source: REGULATION (EU) 2016/679 OF THE EUROPEAN PARLIAMENT AND OF THE COUNCIL - of 27 April 2016 - on the protection of natural persons with regard to the processing of personal data and on the free movement of such data, and repealing Directive 95/46/EC (General Data Protection Regulation)

[PRACTICAL IMPLICATION]:
*   Organizations must adhere to specific rules when processing personal data of EU residents.
*   Public authorities may disclose personal data in documents if mandated by Union or Member State law.
*   The regulation aims to harmonize data protection laws across the EU.
